title: MercadoLibre OAuth refresh-token flow (make the ML import tier production-viable)

tasks.title: Register MercadoLibre OAuth + vault env vars
tasks.description:
Register 4 new env vars: HOSPEDA_MERCADOLIBRE_CLIENT_ID, HOSPEDA_MERCADOLIBRE_CLIENT_SECRET (secret), HOSPEDA_MERCADOLIBRE_REDIRECT_URI, HOSPEDA_OAUTH_VAULT_MASTER_KEY (secret, provider-agnostic name since the credentials table is designed to extend beyond ML). Add full metadata (description/type/required/secret/defaultValue/exampleValue/apps/category) to packages/config/src/env-registry.hospeda.ts. Add Zod fields to ApiEnvBaseSchema in apps/api/src/utils/env.ts. Add placeholder lines to apps/api/.env.example. Do NOT set real values in Coolify yet.
Test requirements: extend/create apps/api/src/utils/env.test.ts asserting the 4 vars parse correctly; run `pnpm env:check:registry` to confirm registry/schema stay in sync.

subtasks.title: Env parsing unit tests + pnpm env:check:registry

tasks.title: Create external_oauth_credentials table + migration
tasks.description:
Add a new Drizzle table external_oauth_credentials under packages/db/src/schemas/integration/, modeled on the encrypted-vault shape of packages/db/src/schemas/ai/ai_provider_credentials.dbschema.ts: id (uuid pk), provider (varchar), accessTokenCiphertext/Iv/AuthTag, refreshTokenCiphertext/Iv/AuthTag, expiresAt (timestamp), createdAt/updatedAt, deletedAt (soft delete). Unique index on provider WHERE deleted_at IS NULL — single active row per provider (no rotation-history needed, unlike the AI vault). Export from packages/db/src/schemas/index.ts. Run `pnpm --filter @repo/db db:generate` and commit the migration.
Test requirements: if a schema-shape unit test exists for ai_provider_credentials, add the equivalent for this table (columns + unique partial index).

tasks.title: [CANCELLED] Create ExternalOauthCredentialModel + unit tests
tasks.description: SUPERSEDED before implementation: read apps/api/src/services/ai-credential-vault.service.ts (the real precedent for encrypted credential vaults in this repo) during T-005 prep and found it does NOT use a packages/db Model/BaseModel layer at all — it's a plain apps/api service module querying the raw Drizzle table (imported from @repo/db) directly via getDb() + drizzle-orm operators (and/eq/isNull), wrapped in withTransaction. Creating a BaseModel-extending Model class here would introduce a layer that contradicts the established pattern. T-005 now queries externalOauthCredentials (from T-002) directly, mirroring ai-credential-vault.service.ts, and depends on T-002 + T-004 only.

tasks.title: Implement OAuth vault crypto util in apps/api
tasks.description:
Create apps/api/src/utils/oauth-vault.ts mirroring apps/api/src/utils/ai-vault.ts exactly: AES-256-GCM via node:crypto, encryptSecret({plaintext}) / decryptSecret({ciphertext, iv, authTag}), 32-byte key derived as sha256(HOSPEDA_OAUTH_VAULT_MASTER_KEY), explicit authTagLength:16, fresh random 12-byte IV per encryption. Deliberate near-duplicate of ai-vault.ts (not a shared extraction) to keep this vault's blast radius isolated from the AI credential vault.
Test requirements: apps/api/test/utils/oauth-vault.test.ts mirroring ai-vault.test.ts if present — roundtrip, tampered ciphertext/iv/authTag throws, missing master key throws with a clear message.

subtasks.title: Unit tests: roundtrip, tamper, missing key

tasks.title: Implement ML credential repository (apps/api)
tasks.description:
Create apps/api/src/services/mercadolibre-oauth/ml-credential.repository.ts, mirroring the real precedent apps/api/src/services/ai-credential-vault.service.ts (plain module, NOT a packages/db Model — queries externalOauthCredentials from T-002 directly via getDb() + drizzle-orm and/eq/isNull, wrapped in withTransaction for the write path). getActiveMLCredential() selects the active row (provider='mercadolibre', deletedAt IS NULL), decrypts both secrets via T-004's vault, returns {accessToken, refreshToken, expiresAt} | null. upsertMLCredential({accessToken, refreshToken, expiresAt}) encrypts both secrets and inserts if no active row exists, else updates in place (single active row, no history, no separate audit table — out of scope).
Test requirements: apps/api/test/services/mercadolibre-oauth/ml-credential.repository.test.ts with getDb mocked (mirror ai-credential-vault.service.test.ts's mocking approach) — get returns null/decrypted correctly; upsert create vs update paths; mock call assertions show ciphertext only, never plaintext.

tasks.title: Implement ML OAuth API client (exchange + refresh)
tasks.description:
Create apps/api/src/services/mercadolibre-oauth/ml-oauth-client.ts wrapping POST https://api.mercadolibre.com/oauth/token. Two functions: exchangeAuthorizationCode({code, redirectUri}) (grant_type=authorization_code) and refreshAccessToken({refreshToken}) (grant_type=refresh_token), using client_id/client_secret from env (T-001). Typed response {accessToken, refreshToken, expiresIn, tokenType}. Verify the exact ML OAuth contract against current ML docs at implementation time — do not hardcode field names from memory. Throw a typed error on non-2xx with the ML error body attached; never log the client_secret or any token.
Test requirements: apps/api/test/services/mercadolibre-oauth/ml-oauth-client.test.ts with fetch mocked — success mapping for both grant types, error-body propagation on 4xx/5xx, no secret in thrown error messages.

tasks.title: Define MLTokenRefreshError with terminal/transient classification
tasks.description:
Create apps/api/src/services/mercadolibre-oauth/ml-token.errors.ts: MLTokenRefreshError (extends Error) carrying kind: 'terminal' | 'transient'. terminal = ML rejected the refresh_token itself (re-auth required, e.g. invalid_grant) -> triggers the T-010 admin alert. transient = network/5xx/timeout -> caller may retry without alerting. Export classifyMLRefreshFailure(error: unknown): MLTokenRefreshError used by T-009.
Test requirements: apps/api/test/services/mercadolibre-oauth/ml-token.errors.test.ts covering both classifications from representative ML error shapes.

tasks.title: Implement token read/cache/expiry-check logic
tasks.description:
Create apps/api/src/services/mercadolibre-oauth/ml-token.service.ts with the read path of getValidMercadoLibreToken(): load the active credential via T-005's repository; if absent, throw MLTokenRefreshError(kind='terminal', 'no ML credential configured'); if present and expiresAt is more than a 5-minute margin away, return the cached access token immediately (no HTTP call); otherwise return a sentinel indicating a refresh is needed (the refresh itself lands in T-009, kept separate to bound complexity).
Test requirements: apps/api/test/services/mercadolibre-oauth/ml-token.service.test.ts — cached-valid-token path, missing-credential throws, near-expiry triggers the refresh-needed branch.

tasks.title: Implement concurrency-safe refresh + atomic persist
tasks.description:
Extend ml-token.service.ts (T-008) so getValidMercadoLibreToken() completes: when a refresh is needed, call T-006's refreshAccessToken, persist the ROTATED refresh_token + new access_token + expiresAt atomically via T-005's upsertMLCredential, and return the new access token. Guard concurrent imports refreshing at once (ML refresh tokens are single-use) with an in-process single-flight promise cache keyed by provider — a second concurrent caller awaits the first's in-flight refresh instead of issuing its own. On refresh failure, classify via T-007 and rethrow.
Test requirements: successful refresh persists rotated values; two concurrent calls during an in-flight refresh trigger exactly ONE refreshAccessToken call (spy assertion); refresh failure propagates the classified error.

tasks.title: Implement admin re-auth alert on terminal refresh failure
tasks.description:
In ml-token.service.ts (T-009), when a terminal MLTokenRefreshError is thrown, send an admin-facing notification via the existing packages/notifications pattern (find and follow the closest existing 'system alert to admins' send-notification call as precedent) stating the ML import tier is down and needs re-authorization via the T-011 admin endpoint. Fire-and-forget — a notification failure must not mask the original token error.
Test requirements: extend ml-token.service.test.ts — terminal failure triggers exactly one notification send with the expected payload; a notification-send throwing internally does not change the rejected error surfaced to the caller.

tasks.title: Admin-only OAuth authorization-start endpoint
tasks.description: DONE. Admin route at GET /api/v1/admin/mercadolibre-oauth/authorize (apps/api/src/routes/integrations/mercadolibre-oauth/authorize.ts), gated by new PermissionEnum.INTEGRATION_MERCADOLIBRE_MANAGE. 302-redirects to MercadoLibre's authorization URL with client_id/redirect_uri/state. In-memory single-use state store with 5min TTL, exported validateAndConsumeState() for T-012. Post-agent fix: returns 503 (HTTPException) instead of a broken redirect when HOSPEDA_MERCADOLIBRE_CLIENT_ID/_REDIRECT_URI are unset — covered by a dedicated authorize.unconfigured.test.ts.

tasks.title: OAuth callback route (exchange code, persist credential)
tasks.description:
Add the paired callback route (?code=&state=) next to T-011: validate state against what T-011 stored (reject 400 on mismatch/expiry), call T-006's exchangeAuthorizationCode, persist via T-005's upsertMLCredential. Admin-only, same permission as T-011. Respond with a simple success page/JSON — never expose the tokens in the response body.
Test requirements: valid code+state persists a credential row (assert via the repository, not raw ciphertext); invalid/expired state rejected 400; non-admin rejected 403; response body never contains the access/refresh token strings.

tasks.title: Add token-provider port to ImportContext + wire injection
tasks.description:
Mirror the existing aiExtract port on ImportContext (packages/service-core/src/services/accommodation-import/adapter.types.ts): add readonly mercadoLibreTokenProvider?: (() => Promise<string>) | undefined, documented the same way (decoupled — apps/api owns the implementation, service-core never imports the vault/token-service directly). In apps/api's import-from-url route, build the context's mercadoLibreTokenProvider as () => getValidMercadoLibreToken() (T-009) instead of the old static credentials.mercadoLibreToken field — stop constructing that field here (full removal happens repo-wide in T-015).
Test requirements: adapter.types port-shape test if one exists for aiExtract (mirror it); apps/api route test asserting the context includes a working mercadoLibreTokenProvider closure.

tasks.title: Rewire ML adapter to token-provider port + credentials_missing degradation
tasks.description:
In packages/service-core/.../adapters/mercadolibre.adapter.ts, replace the static ctx.credentials.mercadoLibreToken read (~lines 338, 355-357) with a call to ctx.mercadoLibreTokenProvider?.() (T-013). If the port is absent OR the call throws, return the existing degraded-empty extraction with failureCode: 'credentials_missing' (SPEC-258 C.1 contract — unchanged shape). A terminal MLTokenRefreshError's admin alert already fired inside the token service (T-010); no adapter-level alert duplication needed.
Test requirements: extend packages/service-core/test/services/accommodation-import/adapters/mercadolibre.adapter.test.ts — successful extraction with a working provider, degraded credentials_missing when absent, degraded credentials_missing when the provider throws.

tasks.title: Remove HOSPEDA_MERCADOLIBRE_TOKEN entirely
tasks.description:
Hard-cut removal (owner-approved, no fallback period): delete HOSPEDA_MERCADOLIBRE_TOKEN from packages/config/src/env-registry.hospeda.ts, the Zod field in apps/api/src/utils/env.ts, the line in apps/api/.env.example, the mercadoLibreToken field from ImportContext['credentials'] (adapter.types.ts), and any remaining static-token branch left in the adapter after T-014.
Test requirements: run pnpm env:check:registry; grep the repo for HOSPEDA_MERCADOLIBRE_TOKEN and mercadoLibreToken post-removal to confirm zero remaining references; update/remove any test fixtures still setting the old field.

tasks.title: Integration tests: OAuth authorization+callback flow
tasks.description:
Add an end-to-end-style integration test spanning T-011 + T-012: admin hits the authorization-start route, follows the (mocked) ML redirect, hits the callback with a valid code+matching state, and asserts a credential row now exists and is retrievable (decrypted) via the repository. Mock the ML OAuth HTTP call using the repo's existing outbound-fetch mock pattern rather than hitting the real ML sandbox.
Test file: apps/api/test/routes/mercadolibre-oauth/oauth-flow.integration.test.ts (or the nearest existing integration-test convention for admin routes).

tasks.title: Integration tests: token refresh + concurrency race
tasks.description:
Add integration-level tests exercising getValidMercadoLibreToken() end-to-end (real repository + vault, mocked ML HTTP client): transparent refresh when near expiry updates the persisted row; N concurrent calls during an in-flight refresh trigger exactly one real ML refresh call and all callers resolve with the same new access token; a refresh that fails with a terminal error surfaces to every waiting caller and does not corrupt the previously-valid persisted state.
Test file: apps/api/test/services/mercadolibre-oauth/ml-token.service.integration.test.ts.

tasks.title: Integration tests: adapter degradation + alert
tasks.description:
Add integration tests covering the full failure path end-to-end: token service throws a terminal MLTokenRefreshError -> admin notification is sent (T-010) -> the ML adapter's extract() returns the credentials_missing degraded extraction (T-014) -> the import-from-url route surfaces the existing SPEC-258 C.1 response shape unchanged. Confirms no regression to the existing degradation contract now that it's reached via the OAuth path instead of the old missing-static-token path.
Test file: apps/api/test/routes/accommodation/import-from-url.mercadolibre-degradation.integration.test.ts (or nearest existing import-route integration test file).

tasks.title: Update env-var + import docs for ML OAuth
tasks.description:
Update docs/guides/environment-variables.md with the 4 new vars (client_id/secret/redirect_uri/vault master key) and an explicit removal note for HOSPEDA_MERCADOLIBRE_TOKEN (pointing at this spec). Add a short note to packages/service-core/CLAUDE.md documenting the new mercadoLibreTokenProvider port on ImportContext alongside the existing aiExtract port, so future OAuth-backed adapters follow the same decoupling pattern.
No test requirements (docs-only task).
